# Feature Request

## Problem Statement

What problem should this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired approach or user outcome.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Given ...
- [ ] When ...
- [ ] Then ...

## Priority

- P0
- P1
- P2
- P3
